descriptors.name: ambient-access
descriptors.rationale: Routes operating at 0 GPa after preparation are more credible than pressure-only states

descriptors.name: protocol-controllability
descriptors.rationale: Explicit quench, strain, or anneal windows make a route engineerable

descriptors.name: structural-memory
descriptors.rationale: Retention often depends on hysteresis or recoverable motifs

descriptors.name: non-reconstructive-tuning
descriptors.rationale: Routes that avoid full reconstructive decomposition are easier to stabilize

descriptors.name: evidence-depth
descriptors.rationale: Transport plus structural or magnetic support is stronger than transport alone

descriptors.name: synthesis-plausibility
descriptors.rationale: Routes that are not trapped in extreme DAC-only conditions are easier to advance

descriptors.name: roomtemp-gap-penalty
descriptors.rationale: Routes closer to 300 K stay more relevant to the stated target

descriptors.name: fragility-penalty
descriptors.rationale: Toxicity, storage sensitivity, or severe handling fragility slow route development
